message:
fix(stdlib): try/except variable capture and json.dumps return type

- Skip stdlib modules and inline functions from try/except variable capture
- Add findLocallyDeclaredVars to skip for-loop variables from capture
- Fix json.dumps to use dumpsDirect returning []const u8 instead of *PyObject
- Add json module type inference for dumps/loads
- Extend BuiltinFuncs list with more modules and inline functions
